body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

side next slide so um this this group has been challenged with intellectual property but it is to remind everyone that when you talk today uh we do follow the irtf intellectual property and uh that everything is going to be um under that and if you want to know there's a bunch of rfcs and and information about this in in the policy repositories next slide same thing for uh privacy and the code of conduct you know this is an iotf we also follow the ietf in this and there's a lot of information about anti-harassment procedure which uh also this group has been challenged um and uh that actually should not happen and we actually have to uh agree to that next line so um i think even uh in these days uh people are still not sure with the irtf that the irtf is not a standards development organization that we do research and that we're interested in research even if that research eventually may lead to a real world implementation that may go to the ietf we are not a standards we are a research organization next slide so uh this is where we are we have obviously a charter that was updated through the years we have a very nice github that has a lot of material our mailing list although we're closing the group is going to be still active to finalize everything we need to do before all the current drafts that are in process will be uh finalized and obviously
